---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new type, helper, or integration
title: ''
labels: ''
assignees: ''

---

**What would you like?**
A new value type, a render/format helper on an existing one, or an integration
(JSON, fpdart, Hive, Flutter validators)?

**The standard it models (for a new type)**
Which published standard defines it (ISO / RFC / ITU / GS1)? Does it have a real
check (checksum / check digit), or is it a shape-only format? A link to the spec
helps a lot.

**Why isn't the raw String/int enough?**
What goes wrong today when this is modelled as a plain primitive?

**Have you checked it isn't already covered?**
The README lists what the Dart stdlib or a strong existing package already
handles well (and that `minted` deliberately does not re-model). Does this fall
into that set?

**Additional context**
Alternatives you've considered, prior art in other languages, anything else.
